title: Registry & System Config
description: Perintah untuk mengelola Windows Registry dan konfigurasi sistem dari command line.

commands.name: reg
commands.title: reg — Registry Editor CLI
commands.description: Mengelola Windows Registry dari command line. Alternatif dari regedit GUI.

options.description: Tipe data: REG_SZ, REG_DWORD, REG_BINARY, REG_EXPAND_SZ, REG_MULTI_SZ

commands.examples:
# Baca registry
reg query HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion

# Baca value tertentu
reg query HKCU\Environment /v PATH

# Tambah value
reg add HKCU\SOFTWARE\MyApp /v Setting1 /t REG_SZ /d "value" /f

# Tambah DWORD
reg add HKCU\SOFTWARE\MyApp /v Enabled /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f

# Hapus value
reg delete HKCU\SOFTWARE\MyApp /v Setting1 /f

# Ekspor
reg export HKCU\SOFTWARE\MyApp backup.reg

# Import
reg import backup.reg

# PowerShell
Get-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\SOFTWARE\MyApp'
Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\SOFTWARE\MyApp' -Name 'Setting1' -Value 'value'
New-Item -Path 'HKCU:\SOFTWARE\MyApp' -Force
commands.warning: Mengubah registry yang salah bisa menyebabkan sistem tidak stabil atau gagal boot. Selalu backup registry sebelum mengubah!

commands.name: bcdedit
commands.title: bcdedit — Boot Configuration
commands.description: Mengelola konfigurasi boot Windows (Boot Configuration Data).
commands.examples:
# Lihat konfigurasi boot
bcdedit

# Set timeout
bcdedit /timeout 10

# Enable Safe Mode
bcdedit /set {current} safeboot minimal

# Disable Safe Mode
bcdedit /deletevalue {current} safeboot

# Backup BCD
bcdedit /export C:\BCD_Backup

# Restore BCD
bcdedit /import C:\BCD_Backup
commands.warning: Mengubah BCD yang salah bisa membuat Windows tidak bisa boot. Selalu buat backup terlebih dahulu!

commands.name: sfc-dism
commands.title: sfc & DISM — Perbaiki Sistem
commands.description: Tool untuk memverifikasi dan memperbaiki file sistem Windows yang rusak.
commands.examples:
# Scan dan perbaiki file sistem
sfc /scannow

# Cek kesehatan image
DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /CheckHealth

# Scan menyeluruh
DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /ScanHealth

# Perbaiki image
DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth

# Perbaiki dengan sumber offline
DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth /Source:D:\sources\install.wim

# Urutan yang direkomendasikan:
# 1. DISM dulu
DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth
# 2. Lalu SFC
sfc /scannow
commands.notes: Jalankan DISM terlebih dahulu sebelum SFC untuk hasil terbaik. Kedua perintah membutuhkan admin privileges.
